title: $82M bought 3 Trump promises — here's how | SEALED
description:
Eighty-two million dollars from Sheldon Adelson in the twenty sixteen cycle — three Trump priorities on his public wish list, all KEPT within eighteen months.

• Iran deal torn up — May 8, 2018
• Embassy to Jerusalem — May 14, 2018
• Campus antisemitism rule expanded — December 11, 2019

Full 145-promise scorecard: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=sealed-001-aipac-iran-deal
